root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_request_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'dd/mm/yyyy')as begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),1,6) as age_life_text ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth,60), 'YYYY') as retire_year
,case when sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code = '01' then 'คงต้น' when sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code = '02' then 'คงยอด' else null end loan_payment_type_desc
,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date,'dd/mm/yyyy')as start_keep_date ,(select sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan from sc_lon_m_loan_request where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as total_old_loan ,(select sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint from sc_lon_m_loan_request where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as total_oldint ,(select sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share from sc_lon_m_loan_request where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as buy_share ,(select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fee_type in ('05','06') )as fee_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve ,(select entry_id from sc_lon_m_loan_request where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as entry_id
,(select loan_objective_description from sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj where loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code and loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) as loan_objective_description
,(select sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as bank_acc_no
,(select sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_bank ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as bank_name
,coalesce((select sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ),'null') as type_pay_money
,(select sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '20/06/2024' and '28/06/2024' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
